# DispatchTimeoutResult.timedOut

**Case**

Indicates that a dispatch operation failed to finish before the specified time elapsed.

## Declaration

```swift
case timedOut
```

## Enumeration Cases

- **DispatchTimeoutResult.success**: Indicates that a dispatch operation successfully finished before the specified time elapsed.

items.description: Indicates that a dispatch operation successfully finished before the specified time elapsed.
items.name: DispatchTimeoutResult.success
